name: Manhattan Corporation Limited
summary: Manhattan Corporation Limited explores for, evaluates, and develops mineral projects in Australia. The company explores for uranium and gold. It holds interests in the Ponton project that covers an area of approximately 460 square kilometers of exploration tenements underlain by tertiary palaeochannels within the Gunbarrel Basin, Western Australia; and the Tibooburra Gold Project comprises of 10 granted exploration licenses covering an area of 1,020 square kilometers located in north western New South Wales. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
